occurrence_sentence: TQD Announces Recruitment Partnership with Tekna search
The Quantum Daily is pleased to announce it is partnering with Tekna Search, a startup recruitment agency founded to support tech business.
"In a space where academia meets industry we can help with attracting the best researchers for your business", said Vincent Yam, Co-Founder of Tekna Search.
